top_signals.title: China Expels Former Politburo Member Over Graft and Sex Charges
top_signals.summary: China expelled former Politburo member Ma Xingrui from the ruling Communist Party, accusing him of a wide range of offenses including corruption, abuse of power and trading political favors for sex.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son sees fusion power as key to AI’s future
top_signals.summary: However, many technological and financial challenges remain for fusion technology to become a viable energy source.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
